title: geranium condensatum
intro: Geranium condensatum, also known as Geranium, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Geranium condensatum include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Geranium condensatum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
